creator: dcs@newsguy.com
text:
To build libficl, and, thus, the loader, a perl script is currently
in use. It is a nice perl script, very well written, and probably the most
efficient tool for the job. But, still, it is perl.

Fix: Apply the following fix to sys/boot/ficl/Makefile, and extract
the file softscript.c into sys/boot/ficl, and softcore.sh into
sys/boot/ficl/softwords. If it is deemed not necessary to change this,
I do have an actual bug fix for softcore.pl... :-)

How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /sys/boot
	make
